changeSet.author: middleware-core
changeSet.comment: Seed system catalog of actions (CRUD + operational verbs)

changeSet.author: middleware-core
changeSet.comment: Seed default menu tree (parents resolved by FK in parent_id column)

changeSet.author: middleware-core
changeSet.comment: Idempotent SUPER_ADMIN grant sync. Runs on every Liquibase update so any new menu/action shipped in a future release is automatically granted to SUPER_ADMIN. ON CONFLICT keeps it safe to re-run.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO admin.role_menu_action (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id, is_granted, created_by, created_date) SELECT 'SUPER_ADMIN', m.id, a.id, TRUE, 'system', NOW() FROM admin.menu m CROSS JOIN admin.action a WHERE m.is_active = TRUE ON CONFLICT (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id) DO NOTHING;
